mapper.sql: select material_id, owner_user_id, owner_role, dept_id, material_category, material_type, title, project_no, related_biz_id, material_data, amount, material_date, file_url, file_name, original_filename, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, reject_reason, remarks, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xg_material
mapper.insert: insert into xg_material(owner_user_id, owner_role, dept_id, material_category, material_type, title, project_no, related_biz_id, material_data, amount, material_date, file_url, file_name, original_filename, audit_status, remarks, create_by, create_time) values(#{ownerUserId}, #{ownerRole}, #{deptId}, #{materialCategory}, #{materialType}, #{title}, #{projectNo}, #{relatedBizId}, #{materialData}, #{amount}, #{materialDate}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{originalFilename}, #{auditStatus}, #{remarks}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from xg_material where material_id in
#{materialId}
mapper.update: update xg_material set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = sysdate(), reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, update_by = #{auditBy}, update_time = sysdate() where material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.insert: insert into xg_audit_record(material_id, audit_action, audit_status, audit_opinion, audit_by, audit_time) values(#{materialId}, #{auditAction}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditOpinion}, #{auditBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(*) materialCount, sum(case when audit_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) pendingCount, sum(case when audit_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) approvedCount, sum(case when owner_role = 'teacher' then 1 else 0 end) teacherUploadCount, sum(case when owner_role = 'student' then 1 else 0 end) studentUploadCount, sum(ifnull(amount, 0)) totalAmount from xg_material

select material_category name, count(*) value from xg_material
group by material_category

select case audit_status when '0' then '待审核' when '1' then '已通过' when '2' then '已驳回' else '草稿' end name, count(*) value from xg_material
group by audit_status

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') name, count(*) value from xg_material
group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by name
